summary: Triple-AND of taker_buy_5m, high_liq, and global_short_high is a paper-shadow monitoring item with no integrity issues; all three component fields are pre-T0 and supported.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: taker_buy_ratio_5m is a trailing 5-minute window measured at/before T0 (not post-T0 like a forward_* or confirm_after_* field); liquidity_bucket is a static/contemporaneous classification; global_short_ratio_high is a snapshot ratio observable at T0. None of the three novel_dim fields reference forward, post_event, or confirm_after semantics, and all are in the SUPPORTED_FIELDS set per R1 lesson.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Side=long on pricechange channel aligns directionally with the live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long strategy rather than opposing it; the conflict is overlap (double-allocation on same symbol/window) rather than opposite-side. At $1000 capital and triple-AND selectivity, expected concurrent overlap is small but should be paper-shadow monitored before any live promotion.
risk_assessments.remediation: Not a blocker. For paper-shadow monitoring: (1) report family-wise lift after Bonferroni/BH correction across the E051/E064/E126/E148 family since this proposal shares parameters with all four; (2) log per-symbol trigger distribution and flag if >50% of triggers concentrate in 1–2 symbols (single-point-failure check); (3) tag overlap windows with the live pump-long strategy in the shadow ledger so combined exposure can be observed before any future live consideration.
